note: Total shift duration in minutes. Time slots: 0 to 479.
Resolution of the time horizon (1-minute slots).
RC buffer capacity per line in batch units (20000 kg / 500 kg per batch).
Safety stock threshold (theta_SS). Idle penalty active when B_l < this value.
Setup time (sigma) required when switching between different SKU types on the same roaster.
Max PSC batches schedulable per roaster per shift = floor(shift_length_min / process_time_min) = floor(480/15) = 32. Total PSC pool = 5 roasters x 32 = 160 candidate batches.
Starting RC stock on Line 1 at shift start (batch units).
Starting RC stock on Line 2 at shift start (batch units).
Line 1 packaging consumes 1 RC batch every 9.1 minutes (rho_L1). (Changed from 8.1)
Line 2 packaging consumes 1 RC batch every 8.8 minutes (rho_L2). (Changed from 7.8)
Penalty per consumption event where B_l < 0 (strictly negative). Applied in reactive mode only — stockout is a hard constraint in deterministic mode. NOT a per-minute rate.
Penalty per minute an MTO job finishes after due_time_min (slot 240).
Penalty per minute a roaster is idle (not busy and not in planned downtime) while B_l < safety_stock_batches on its line.
Lump-sum penalty per SKU changeover event on a roaster. Incurred once when roaster enters SETUP state (e.g. PSC->NDG). Separate from setup time cost.
Penalty per minute a roaster is idle because its output line RC buffer is full (= max_rc_batches_per_line). For R3 (flexible): both lines must be full.
Expected number of UPS events per shift (Poisson arrival rate). Used as default for Q-learning training and evaluation. (Changed from 2 to 5)
Mean UPS repair duration in minutes (Exponential distribution). Used as default for Q-learning training and evaluation.
GC silo capacity for (L1 PSC) in batch-units.
GC silo capacity for (L1 NDG) in batch-units.
GC silo capacity for (L1 BUSTA) in batch-units.
GC silo capacity for (L2 PSC) in batch-units.
Initial GC stock for (L1 PSC) in batch-units.
Initial GC stock for (L1 NDG) in batch-units.
Initial GC stock for (L1 BUSTA) in batch-units.
Initial GC stock for (L2 PSC) in batch-units.
Duration of one GC restock operation in minutes
GC batch-units added per completed restock.
Large penalty applied when a hard constraint is violated. Episode terminates immediately.
If 1 the episode ends on any hard constraint breach. If 0 violations are penalized but episode continues.
Reward added per slot per line where rc_stock >= safety_stock. Dense shaping signal to encourage restocking. Set to 0 to disable.
Penalty per MTO batch not completed by end of shift. Per mathematical model c_skip = $100000 (Changed from 50000).
